## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '…'
2. Tap '…'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include screenshots if helpful).

## Environment

- Device / OS: <!-- e.g. iPhone 15, iOS 18 -->
- Browser: <!-- e.g. Safari, Chrome -->
- Installed as a PWA (home screen) or in a browser tab?
- App version: <!-- the build label shown at the bottom of the app -->
